subject: Re: Luân's License Inquiry
snippet: Chào anh Luân, Em xin lỗi vì phản hồi hơi chậm và cảm ơn anh đã quan tâm đến kho nhạc EMVN ạ! Sau khi xem xét chi tiết dự án của mình, bên em thấy anh muốn dùng các bài hát để xây dựng và phát triển
body:
Chào anh Luân,

Em xin lỗi vì phản hồi hơi chậm và cảm ơn anh đã quan tâm đến kho nhạc EMVN
ạ!

Sau khi xem xét chi tiết dự án của mình, bên em thấy anh muốn dùng các bài
hát để xây dựng và phát triển kênh YouTube thuần nhạc. Tiếc là theo chính
sách hiện tại, EMVN chưa thể cấp phép bản quyền cho mục đích sử dụng này.

Tuy nhiên, anh có thể cân nhắc dịch vụ EMVN Network. Khi tham gia Network,
mình sẽ nhận được những đặc quyền như:

   - *Khai thác trọn bộ kho nhạc*: Thoải mái sử dụng toàn bộ catalog âm
   nhạc phong phú của EMVN.
   - *Quản lý bản quyền*: Đảm bảo kênh được bảo vệ bản quyền tuyệt đối với
   hệ thống Content ID.
   - *Hỗ trợ tăng trưởng:* Nhận tư vấn 1:1 từ chuyên gia về các giải pháp
   tối ưu doanh thu và phát triển kênh..

Em có đính kèm bản *Giới thiệu dịch vụ* trong email này để anh tham khảo
thêm. Để thuận tiện trao đổi nhanh hoặc giải đáp kỹ hơn về các điều khoản,
anh có thể kết nối với em qua Zalo: 0389 711 861 ạ.

Ngoài ra, nếu có các dự án sáng tạo khác cần sử dụng nhạc, anh cứ chia sẻ
thêm với bọn em nhé.

Rất hy vọng có cơ hội được hợp tác cùng anh!

Trân trọng,
*Chau Pham*
*Account Executive*


The first and largest production music library <https://emvn.co/EML> in
Vietnam with *1,5**00,000+* right-managed tracks.

*Tel:* +84 35 998 2535
*Email:* copyright@emvn.co
*Web:* https://emvn.co/
*Post:* HM Town, 412 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai, Dist. 3, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam


On Thu, Mar 19, 2026 at 7:30 AM license@emvn.co <support@emvn.co> wrote:

> Hi,
>
> Thank you so much for your interest in our music.
>
> Before moving forward, we would like to know more about your project:
>
>
>    1. Project type (Personal, Business, Advertising, Film, Video Game,
>    etc.)
>    2. The main content of your project: Is the track used as the
>    background music (for ads, movies,...) or standalone basis (for music
>    listening purposes)?
>    3. Distribution platform (Web Streaming, VOD, TV, Theater, Film
>    Festival, DVD, Youtube, etc.)
>    4. The URLs of your platforms (such as your Youtube channels in which
>    the track will be used,...)
>
> If you have any questions or would like to discuss this further, you can
> reply to this email or contact me directly via Zalo/WhatsApp at: +84 389
> 711 861.
>
> Best regards,
>
> EMVN Music Licensing
>

subject: NAB Show 2026 | New Sounds | Explore the API
body:
Can't see this email? [Open in your browser.](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/web-view?a=SrQ4DN&c=01JCN4RWFESWGKZ37549TT9B7S&k=28d075326e778ab5ed370e97be48b4c8&m=01KNS7WEKW5NFETJNMDXA6CRQM&r=01KNSJ6N3ETS118BS1WTRMVAH3)

[Pro Sound Effects.](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/)

[Pro Sound Effects.](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/)

[Audio Innovation for Partners](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/partnerships)

Trade show season is here again! Or maybe it never left...
 
I’m excited to be at NAB in Las Vegas from April 18-22 and would love to meet up in person. If you’ll be there, reply to this email or drop me a line at [jeremy@prosoundeffects.com](mailto:jeremy@prosoundeffects.com) to set up some time to connect.

 
See you there!

Jeremy Siegel,
Director of Strategic Partnerships

[Jeremy Siegel](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jiegel/)

Jeremy Siegel,
Director of Strategic Partnerships

Latest News

New Sounds Powering Our Partners

So far in 2026, we’ve expanded our catalog with new, high-quality recordings designed to support real-world products, workflows, and datasets – all developed from our award-winning sound artists:

- [King Collection: Vehicles Vol. 3-5](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/libraries/king-collection-vehicles-vol-3) – Extensive, high-fidelity vehicle recordings from Academy Award®-winner Richard King (Oppenheimer, Inception)

- [Game Audio Collection: Melee Weapons](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/libraries/game-audio-collection-melee-weapons) & [Ambiences](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/libraries/game-audio-collection-ambiences) – Clean, isolated weapon interactions and layered environmental recordings built for game audio workflows

- [Electric Motorcycles](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/libraries/electric-motorcycles) – Futuristic EV recordings by Academy Award®-winner Mark Mangini (Dune, Mad Max: Fury Road), captured with multi-perspective detail for modern and sci-fi applications

- [Material Destruction](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/libraries/material-destruction) – High-impact debris, wreckage, and material breakups by Emmy®-winning sound artist Matt Yocum, designed for dynamic, large-scale destruction

[Explore the PSE API](https://blog.prosoundeffects.com/pse-partner-api)

Explore the PSE API

Our API allows partners to experience a robust SFX offering and experience with ease, relying on our world-class sounds and optimized, AI-powered search endpoints. [Learn More](https://blog.prosoundeffects.com/pse-partner-api)

[Pro Sound Effects.](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/)

Sound brings our ideas, stories, memories, and emotions to life. The team at Pro Sound Effects (PSE) shares a passion for sound and belief in creative freedom. Based in Brooklyn since 2004, we’ve been on a mission to empower all creators to quickly find and use the right sounds for any creation.

[Get a Custom Quote](https://www.prosoundeffects.com/contact-sales) [Visit the PSE Blog](https://blog.prosoundeffects.com/) [Get Help](https://hello.prosoundeffects.com/help-center)

[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/prosoundeffects/)
[LinkedIn](https://www.youtube.com/user/prosoundeffects)
[Twitter](https://x.com/prosoundeffects)
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/prosoundeffects/)
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/pro-sound-effects)
[Tiktok](https://www.tiktok.com/@prosoundeffects)

subject: Re: [EMVN] Offer for Legal Intern position
snippet: Dear Hanh, Thank you for your confirmation. We're glad to have you on board as our Legal Intern. Please check your email for the Offer Letter, NDA, and Notice and Approval of Personal Data
body:
Dear Hanh,

Thank you for your confirmation. We’re glad to have you on board as our
Legal Intern.

Please check your email for the Offer Letter, NDA, and Notice and Approval
of Personal Data Processing. Let us know if you have any questions or
require further clarification.

Kindly review, sign, and return the documents at your earliest convenience
so we can proceed with the onboarding process.

Looking forward to having you join EMVN.

*Best regards, *
EMVN HR.

On Thu, 26 Mar 2026 at 13:13, Nguyệt Hạnh Nguyễn <nguyethanh10a2@gmail.com>
wrote:

> Dear EMVN,
>
> Thank you very much for the position of Legal Intern. I truly appreciate
> the opportunity and am excited to accept this offer.
>
> I am looking forward to joining your team and contributing to the company.
> Please let me know the next steps and any documents or information required
> before my start date.
>
> Thank you once again for this opportunity.
>
> Best regards,
> Nguyen Nguyet Hanh
>
>
>
> On Thu, Mar 26, 2026, 12:52 EMVN Talents <talents@emvn.co> wrote:
>
>> Dear Nguyễn Nguyệt Hạnh,
>>
>> We are pleased to extend to you an offer for the position of *Legal
>> Intern* at EMVN.
>>
>> *Details are as follows:*
>> - *Start Date*: April 1st, 2026
>> - *Internship Duration*: 6 months
>> - *Working Time*: Full-time (8 working hours/day), from 9:00 A.M.M to
>> 6:00 P.M
>> - *Working Model*: Hybrid (combination of in-office and remote work)
>> - *Allowance*: 3,000,000 VND/month
>>
>> *Scope of Work: *

>>

>>
>>

>>

subject: RE: [EMVN] TƯ VẤN VỀ CẬP NHẬT HỒ SƠ DPIA VÀ DỊCH VỤ ĐÀO TẠO DPO
snippet: Kính gửi chị Hoài/ Công ty TNHH Giải trí Đa phương tiện Epicmusicvn (“EMVN”) Cảm ơn chị đã liên hệ với Vision & Associates Legal (“V&A Legal”) về dịch vụ tư vấn bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân, cụ thể
body:
Kính gửi chị Hoài/ Công ty TNHH Giải trí Đa phương tiện Epicmusicvn (“EMVN”)
 
Cảm ơn chị đã liên hệ với Vision & Associates Legal (“V&A Legal”) về dịch vụ tư vấn bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân, cụ thể là cập nhật hồ sơ DPIA định kỳ và đào tạo nhân sự DPO.
 
Như đã trao đổi, anh Lê Tuấn Anh – Partner của V&A Legal phụ trách mảng bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân cùng team của anh ấy sẽ xem xét và gửi báo giá cho các dịch vụ mà EMVN yêu cầu. Trong quá trình nghiên cứu/chào phí, nếu cần làm rõ vấn đề liên quan hoặc cần thêm thông tin/tài liệu, anh Tuấn Anh và team của anh ấy cũng sẽ báo lại với Hoài/EMVN.
 
Ngoài ra, Vision cũng xin đính kèm email này: (i) Firm Profile chung của V&A Legal; và (ii) Năng lực, kinh nghiệm của V&A về Data Privacy, để chị Hoài/Quý Công ty tham khảo/có thông tin.
 
Trân trọng,
 
Le Nguyen Anh Vu (Mr.) | Partner / Director of HCMC Office 
M: (+84) 914 474 000 | E:  <mailto:lna.vu@vision-associates.com> lna.vu@vision-associates.com
W:  <https://vision-associates.com/> https://vision-associates.com | L:  <https://www.linkedin.com/company/vision-associates.com> https://www.linkedin.com/company/vision-associates.com
  _____  

This e-mail is confidential and may be legally privileged. It is intended solely for the addressee. If you are not the intended recipient, please delete it and notify the author immediately; you should not copy or use it for any purpose, nor disclose its contents to any other person. Thank you.
 
Vision & Associates
Attorneys, Patent & Trademark Agents
Investment & Business Consultants
Unit 905, Floor 9, Citilight Tower, 
45 Vo Thi Sau Street, Tan Dinh, HCMC, Vietnam
Tel: (84 28) 3823 6495 | Fax: (84 28) 3823 6496
  _____  

 
From: EMVN Legal [mailto:legal@emvn.co] 
Sent: Thursday, March 12, 2026 2:55 PM
To: lt.anh@vision-associates.com; lna.vu@vision-associates.com
Cc: EMVN Legal <legal@emvn.co>; Thu Hoang <thu.hoang@emvn.co>; Thanh Hoang <thanh.hoang@emvn.co>
Subject: [EMVN] TƯ VẤN VỀ CẬP NHẬT HỒ SƠ DPIA VÀ DỊCH VỤ ĐÀO TẠO DPO
 
Dear anh Anh Vũ và team Vision & Associates, 

Team Legal của EMVN có liên hệ với anh Anh Vũ qua số điện thoại để trao đổi về nhu cầu tư vấn dịch vụ của EMVN trong vấn đề cập nhật hồ sơ đánh giá tác động định kỳ và tổ chức đào tạo nội bộ về tuân thủ bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân. 

EMVN Legal Team xin cập nhật lại một số thông tin chính để team Vision có cơ sở gửi báo giá về việc tư vấn các dịch vụ liên quan: 
*	Tháng 8/2025, EMVN đã nộp bộ hồ sơ đánh giá tác động xử lý dữ liệu cá nhân theo quy định tại Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP. Cho đến thời điểm hiện tại, EMVN chưa nhận được thông tin phản hồi từ phía A05. 
*	Theo quy định của Luật Bảo vệ DLCN, doanh nghiệp cần cập nhật/nộp hồ sơ đánh giá tác động định kỳ mỗi 06 tháng. EMVN có mong muốn tham khảo dịch vụ cập nhật này dựa trên bộ hồ sơ đã nộp. 
*	Bộ phận phụ trách bảo vệ DLCN của EMVN bao gồm 03 thành viên. Theo Nghị định 365/2025/NĐ-CP, nhân sự bảo vệ DLCN cần được đào tạo, bồi dưỡng kiến thức pháp luật và kỹ năng chuyên môn về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân. EMVN có nhu cầu liên quan đến việc hỗ trợ cho bộ phận này đạt đủ tiêu chuân theo quy định pháp luật. 
Nếu cần phía EMVN cung cấp thêm thông tin, vui lòng liệt kê những nội dung cần bổ sung qua luồng email này. EMVN mong muốn nhận được báo giá dịch vụ cho 02 yêu cầu trên. 

Với trường hợp cần EMVN cung cấp các thông tin chi tiết, nhờ team Vision gửi mẫu NDA để các Bên thực hiện ký kết. 

Trân trọng, 
EMVN Legal Team. 
 
 
 


--

subject: [EMVN] Bản nháp Chứng từ khấu trừ thuế thu nhập cá nhân 2025
snippet: Thân gửi anh/chị Nguyễn Đặng Uyên Nhi, Công ty TNHH Giải trí Đa phương tiện Epicmusicvn gửi anh/chị bản nháp Chứng từ khấu trừ thuế TNCN năm 2025. Anh/chị vui lòng kiểm tra kỹ thông tin trên chứng từ
body:
Thân gửi anh/chị Nguyễn Đặng Uyên Nhi,

Công ty TNHH Giải trí Đa phương tiện Epicmusicvn gửi anh/chị bản nháp Chứng
từ khấu trừ thuế TNCN năm 2025.

Anh/chị vui lòng kiểm tra kỹ thông tin trên chứng từ đính kèm. Trong trường
hợp cần điều chỉnh hoặc có bất kỳ thắc mắc nào, vui lòng phản hồi lại email
này để được hỗ trợ.

Nếu không nhận được phản hồi, chứng từ điện tử sẽ được phát hành chính thức
và gửi đến email the.lady.nhi@gmail.com trong vòng 3 ngày làm việc.

Trân trọng,

EMVN Accounting Team

subject: TCBS - Sao Kê Tài Khoản Đầu Tư Tháng 03/2026
snippet: English below SAO KÊ TÀI KHOẢN ĐẦU TƯ Kính gửi Quý khách, Techcom Securities trân trọng gửi Quý khách, Sao Kê Điện Tử Tài Khoản Đầu Tư được đính kèm email này dưới dạng tập tin PDF và đã được mã hóa vì
body: a {text-decoration: none;} sup { font-size: 100% !important; } 96 English below SAO KÊ TÀI KHOẢN ĐẦU TƯ Kính gửi Quý khách, Techcom Securities trân trọng gửi Quý khách, Sao Kê Điện Tử Tài Khoản Đầu Tư được đính kèm email này dưới dạng tập tin PDF và đã được mã hóa vì lý do bảo mật. Để mở Bảng Sao Kê, Quý khách vui lòng nhập mật khẩu là ngày tháng năm sinh của Quý khách gồm 8 ký tự theo định dạng DDMMYYYY DD: 2 số ngày sinh MM: 2 số tháng sinh YYYY: 4 số năm sinh Ví dụ: Quý khách có ngày sinh là 01 tháng 05 năm 1980, mật khẩu để mở Bảng Sao Kê Điện Tử sẽ là: 01051980 Với KH tổ chức trong nước, Quý khách vui lòng nhập mật khẩu là Số đăng ký kinh doanh (SĐKKD). Với KH tổ chức nước ngoài, Quý khách vui lòng nhập mật khẩu là 6 số cuối của số Tài khoản chứng khoán. Thư điện tử này được gửi ra từ hệ thống tự động. Quý khách vui lòng không trả lời thư điện tử này. Trong trường hợp Quý khách có bất kỳ thắc mắc hoặc yêu cầu nào liên quan đến Báo cáo danh mục trái phiếu, vui lòng liên hệ với chúng tôi qua số 1900 232 366 để được hỗ trợ. Trân trọng, Công ty Cổ phần Chứng khoán Kỹ Thương E-STATEMENT OF INVESTMENT ACCOUNT Dear Valued customer, Techcom Securities are pleased to provide you with the e-Statement of Investment Account attached to this email in PDF format. The file has been encrypted for security purposes. To access the statement, please enter your password, which is your date of birth in the format DDMMYYYY, consisting of 8 characters.  DD: 2 digits of the day of birth MM: 2 digits of the month of birth YYYY: 4 digits of the year of birth For example, if your date of birth is May 1, 1980, the password would be : 01051980 For domestic corporate customers, please enter your Business Registration Number as the password. For foreign corporate customers, please enter the last 6 digits of your securities account number as the password.   This email is sent from an automated system. Please do not reply to this email. If you have any questions or requests regarding the E-Statement, please contact us at 1900 232 366 for assistance. Sincerely, Techcom Securities Joint Stock Company Công ty Cổ phần Chứng khoán Kỹ Thương (Techcom Securities) Tầng 27, Tầng 28 và Tầng 29, Tòa C5 D’Capitale, Số 119 Đường Trần Duy Hưng, Phường Yên Hòa, Thành phố Hà Nội Tầng 8, Số 23 Lê Duẩn, Phường Sài Gòn, TP Hồ Chí Minh Email: cskh@tcbs.com.vn | Web:  www.tcbs.com.vn     Sở dĩ Quý khách nhận được thư điện tử này bởi vì Quý khách đã chấp thuận cho Công ty cổ phần Chứng Khoán Kỹ Thương (Techcom Securities) gửi đến cho Quý khách các thông tin và chương trình khuyến mãi liên quan đến sản phẩm và dịch vụ của Techcom Securities. subject: Re: ✨ Introducing Cremi.AI: The Future of Music Video [A new tool for you to try out] 🎬
snippet: Hi Sam, Thank you for providing the detailed information. We've received your inquiry regarding the budget and truly appreciate your interest. At the moment, we're reviewing all collaboration
body:
Hi Sam,

Thank you for providing the detailed information.

We’ve received your inquiry regarding the budget and truly appreciate your
interest. At the moment, we’re reviewing all collaboration options
internally to ensure the best possible fit.

To share a bit more context, we’re currently in the process of evolving and
rebuilding our core product, with a new version planned for launch next
month. Because of this, we’d prefer to align on budget and scope once the
updated version is live, so we can create something more impactful together.

Once the new version is launched, we’ll be happy to notify you so you can
experience the tool firsthand if you’d like.

Thanks again for your understanding, and I’m looking forward to speaking
with you soon 😀

--

Make your songs visible,

Cremi.AI

subject: Album Submission
snippet: Dear, we are Enzo Orefice and Luciano Pizzella, Italian composers and music producers, and we would like to submit two complete albums for your editorial consideration. The SoundCloud links provided
body:
Dear,

we are Enzo Orefice and Luciano Pizzella, Italian composers and music producers, and we would like to submit two complete albums for your editorial consideration.

The SoundCloud links provided below allow you to listen to the proposed works in full.

Our project has been active for several years and has surpassed 60 million streams across major digital platforms. We currently collaborate on an ongoing basis with numerous international music libraries, including BMG, Crucial Music, ScoreKeepers, Intervox, Sound Attack, Amadea, Nuvotone, Twelvetone Music, Shock-Wave Sound, MuchasMusic, StoryBlocks, Biblioteque, Twisted Juke Box, Narrative Mind, 7Styles, among others. We maintain a structured, consistent daily music production, aligned with sync and licensing market requirements.

We would be pleased to provide any additional information or materials you may require.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Kind regards,







Enzo Orefice & Luciano Pizzella




https://soundcloud.com/maestraccio/sets/spy-music/s-BIR92z6NTQm?si=2d27f1f9e67f430aacee0defe0bca23a&utm_source=clipboard&utm_medium=text&utm_campaign=social_sharing




https://soundcloud.com/maestraccio/sets/60s-instrumental-rock/s-Ji79rW4cZAZ?si=e1376aa1a0e84f369a8e4bc432e6b179&utm_source=clipboard&utm_medium=text&utm_campaign=social_sharing

subject: Where the world's wealthy are actually moving in 2026?
body:
Andrew Henderson joined CNBC Africa to explain the shift.

Nomad Capitalist News Hero (https://dk4SWv04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UE+113/dk4SWv04/VW7ZQK5l-P-9W7BQqX77wJydwW5NMkyh5M3dB5N1k24XM5n4LbW69t95C6lZ3pVVKmHLQ5hXpYnW7BSzhR2Fvt-gVpWNsV7hgvXjW91zFF95PkY3YW8N9xZd8HnLd0W5hD2pZ7jWqjSVJldZh6zNzJxN69FSf5dQHVcW6MVqVs6cP43RN4bfX8l53gLqW4Fc0DT6qhr5qW6qmG1Z8PKFD4W5VRtZd7m8JzvW7DbGJp837Bn2W9gZGH_3wQH-_W2fdfBK2kwqFtW9dnRqH8B_s-ZW8Xgs-25xQdTMW5C7xjQ6_MmmGW2QKpsX99LNY5W7-3BSm824G3GW7-GGk_8WMdtPW2xtBCf8cRrMjW5Dhbbh5xQv-4W4vWcW55SsgL0W7Vj5QQ6b10QHW717q3P2_5px7W4J2PQJ5f95MYW1-p-pN5RDBHcW9h02fn6mPK2kW1KycBS4lfSrYW1lSvj43qTxY9W3P4FxL7g3ND3W5MYg5C7N_1ZfW85QJxL5d6mjgN2P8b3Kb0Lftf4NxB5K04 )

The wealthy aren't moving to one place anymore.

They're spreading across three.

Hello Thanh,

If you're still thinking about "moving abroad" as picking one city and relocating everything there, you're already behind.

Our founder Andrew Henderson recently joined CNBC Africa (https://dk4SWv04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UE+113/dk4SWv04/VW7ZQK5l-P-9W7BQqX77wJydwW5NMkyh5M3dB5N1k24XM5n4LbW69t95C6lZ3pVVKmHLQ5hXpYnW7BSzhR2Fvt-gVpWNsV7hgvXjW91zFF95PkY3YW8N9xZd8HnLd0W5hD2pZ7jWqjSVJldZh6zNzJxN69FSf5dQHVcW6MVqVs6cP43RN4bfX8l53gLqW4Fc0DT6qhr5qW6qmG1Z8PKFD4W5VRtZd7m8JzvW7DbGJp837Bn2W9gZGH_3wQH-_W2fdfBK2kwqFtW9dnRqH8B_s-ZW8Xgs-25xQdTMW5C7xjQ6_MmmGW2QKpsX99LNY5W7-3BSm824G3GW7-GGk_8WMdtPW2xtBCf8cRrMjW5Dhbbh5xQv-4W4vWcW55SsgL0W7Vj5QQ6b10QHW717q3P2_5px7W4J2PQJ5f95MYW1-p-pN5RDBHcW9h02fn6mPK2kW1KycBS4lfSrYW1lSvj43qTxY9W3P4FxL7g3ND3W5MYg5C7N_1ZfW85QJxL5d6mjgN2P8b3Kb0Lftf4NxB5K04 ) to break down one of the biggest shifts we're seeing among high-net-worth individuals right now: the move from single-destination relocation to multi-jurisdiction strategy.

Here's what that looks like in practice.

Instead of choosing one country, our clients are living in one place, banking in another, and investing in a third.

They're building diversified international footprints designed for tax efficiency, personal freedom, and long-term security.

And the destinations are changing too.

We're seeing a clear move away from traditional Western financial centers.

Cities like Kuala Lumpur and Bangkok are emerging as more livable, more affordable alternatives to hubs like Singapore. Across the Atlantic, North Americans are increasingly drawn to Panama, Uruguay, and Portugal.

What's driving this? A few things:

↗

Rising tax burdens

Western countries keep increasing the load on entrepreneurs and investors

↘

Declining safety

Quality of life dropping in major cities across the West

✕

Government frustration

Services that don't match what people are paying for

◎

Passport reassessment

Post-Covid rethinking of what citizenship is actually worth

But the real story Andrew shared on CNBC Africa (https://dk4SWv04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UE+113/dk4SWv04/VW7ZQK5l-P-9W7BQqX77wJydwW5NMkyh5M3dB5N1k24XM5n4LbW69t95C6lZ3pVVKmHLQ5hXpYnW7BSzhR2Fvt-gVpWNsV7hgvXjW91zFF95PkY3YW8N9xZd8HnLd0W5hD2pZ7jWqjSVJldZh6zNzJxN69FSf5dQHVcW6MVqVs6cP43RN4bfX8l53gLqW4Fc0DT6qhr5qW6qmG1Z8PKFD4W5VRtZd7m8JzvW7DbGJp837Bn2W9gZGH_3wQH-_W2fdfBK2kwqFtW9dnRqH8B_s-ZW8Xgs-25xQdTMW5C7xjQ6_MmmGW2QKpsX99LNY5W7-3BSm824G3GW7-GGk_8WMdtPW2xtBCf8cRrMjW5Dhbbh5xQv-4W4vWcW55SsgL0W7Vj5QQ6b10QHW717q3P2_5px7W4J2PQJ5f95MYW1-p-pN5RDBHcW9h02fn6mPK2kW1KycBS4lfSrYW1lSvj43qTxY9W3P4FxL7g3ND3W5MYg5C7N_1ZfW85QJxL5d6mjgN2P8b3Kb0Lftf4NxB5K04 ) is what's happening on the African continent.

Countries like São Tomé and Príncipe, Sierra Leone, and Mauritius are opening up with new citizenship and residency pathways.

For those willing to move early, Africa represents the next frontier market, a chance to plant your flag before the crowd arrives.

Watch Andrew's full CNBC Africa interview here:
(https://dk4SWv04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UE+113/dk4SWv04/VW7ZQK5l-P-9W7BQqX77wJydwW5NMkyh5M3dB5N1k24XM5n4LbW69t95C6lZ3pVVKmHLQ5hXpYnW7BSzhR2Fvt-gVpWNsV7hgvXjW91zFF95PkY3YW8N9xZd8HnLd0W5hD2pZ7jWqjSVJldZh6zNzJxN69FSf5dQHVcW6MVqVs6cP43RN4bfX8l53gLqW4Fc0DT6qhr5qW6qmG1Z8PKFD4W5VRtZd7m8JzvW7DbGJp837Bn2W9gZGH_3wQH-_W2fdfBK2kwqFtW9dnRqH8B_s-ZW8Xgs-25xQdTMW5C7xjQ6_MmmGW2QKpsX99LNY5W7-3BSm824G3GW7-GGk_8WMdtPW2xtBCf8cRrMjW5Dhbbh5xQv-4W4vWcW55SsgL0W7Vj5QQ6b10QHW717q3P2_5px7W4J2PQJ5f95MYW1-p-pN5RDBHcW9h02fn6mPK2kW1KycBS4lfSrYW1lSvj43qTxY9W3P4FxL7g3ND3W5MYg5C7N_1ZfW85QJxL5d6mjgN2P8b3Kb0Lftf4NxB5K04 )

How Nomad Capitalist can help

The clients who moved to Panama, Kuala Lumpur, and Mauritius early got the best deals and the fewest barriers. Everything Mr. Henderson discussed on CNBC Africa is exactly what we design for our clients every day: your tax residency, banking, passport, and investments, all working together across jurisdictions.

If you want your own version of this strategy, your bespoke plan is the first step.

Apply to Become a Client
(https://dk4SWv04.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UE+113/dk4SWv04/VW7ZQK5l-P-9W7BQqX77wJydwW5NMkyh5M3dB5N1k24YF3pyd0W7Y8-PT6lZ3q4W8ybJR17ws_fcW7jVKw791yk5kN6b2CGLXmhjNW2ksSG7313810W3_hqh676F9yVW1W5fVl4mfsnQW2qs7m829_LFRW8f3qx44RmVZSW3HB0gm2kkCynW7qyt-c62jf-0W69mWB48YLqDSW6qLVgw6h1SxJVfvcdP4xwfSgW6_d48b6G5PGbW7yjJqT5XZNHvW3L3bYR73-wcfW3_pmVT5bHRXlW936jw65vDQ_6W6gSvq07lPf-dW12LHd83p_pt5W5VNnP05CwYTbW2jnjW961wSBQT_TPG1LPcxGW7G7Y579bD_pFW7bcGzV5sDCg_VtTgwZ7fhN1qf7zsBb804 )

body:
HI Yen Nhi,


I was able to release the claims you sent over. However, in the "Takedown"
sheet, there isn't a video link. Do you mind providing that? Once I have
that, I can issue the takedown. Thanks!


- Georgia

On Mon, Mar 30, 2026 at 12:57 PM Support Partner <support@emvn.co> wrote:

> Hi Jarrett and Georgia,
> Please help us with the following requests:

> SourceAudio claims these videos using ViVi Records music, but we found no
> corresponding claims on our end.
> *2. Remove Assets*
> Please help us take down the videos mentioned in the attached file named
> "Takedown (30.3.2026). They are using music from our artist without
> permission.
> Thank you in advance.
> Best regards,

  }
}
@media (max-width: 1024px) {

    width: auto;
    padding: 0;
  }

  .typography.editor .captioned-image-container figure:has(> a.image2-align-left.thefp),

  .typography.editor .captioned-image-container figure:has(> a.image2-offset-right) {

subject: 🚀 Artemis 2 nails historic splashdown
snippet: April 12, 2026 | Read online Welcome back, Superhuman. The world held its breath on Friday as NASA's Artemis II crew wrapped up a historic lunar mission with a dramatic splashdown, injecting fresh
body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/5fc5476e-52ae-44bb-aac3-06014abe3a4c/SH_Sunday_Sponsor_Banner_-_Viktor__1___1_.jpg?t=1775824137)
Follow image link: (https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/3317757434715/WN_-xxc6-5rS-CYeRBF_hApfg)
Caption: 

**Welcome back, Superhuman. **The world held its breath on Friday as NASA’s Artemis II crew wrapped up a historic lunar mission with a dramatic splashdown, injecting fresh momentum into the global race to put humans back on the Moon by 2028. Meanwhile, deep in the jungle, a brutal chimpanzee war has left scientists stunned, offering a chilling window into the evolutionary roots of human violence.

----------
**The Sunday Special** is designed to help you discover the most interesting and important scientific and technological breakthroughs outside of AI. Our regular AI updates will resume as usual on Monday.


----------———————————————————————————

#### **SCIENCE SUNDAY**

## **The most interesting scientific and technological breakthroughs this week**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/dc50d2ba-7308-476b-9d90-c40c0cb75615/Group_1000005180__1_.jpg?t=1775949395)
Follow image link: (https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/videos/c4gxw3xmzeyo)
Caption: Click here to watch the historic moment when NASA’s Artemis 2 successfully returns to Earth. Photo: NASA

**1. Artemis 2 makes successful splashdown after historic moon journey: **NASA's Artemis II crew [splashed down](https://www.reuters.com/science/artemis-ii-astronauts-hurtle-home-moon-toward-splashdown-2026-04-10/) safely in the Pacific Ocean after a 10-day mission that took astronauts farther from Earth than any human in history. Widely considered the most [dangerous part](https://www.nytimes.com/2026/04/09/science/nasa-artemis-ii-earth-return-heat-shield.html) of the mission, the splashdown was a critical hardware test of the Orion capsule's heat shield, which survived re-entry at 32x the speed of sound. NASA now has its sights set on a crewed moon landing in 2028. Watch the historic moment [here](https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/videos/c4gxw3xmzeyo). 

**2. Scientists left stunned at the outbreak of massive chimpanzee civil war: **Scientists studying a 200-strong chimpanzee community in Uganda have just documented the first definitively confirmed primate civil war on record. Researchers believe the deaths of five key "social bridge" males in 2014 may have ignited the violence. The study [documents](https://www.sciencefocus.com/news/a-massive-once-in-500-years-chimpanzee-civil-war-has-broken-out) instances of former companions turning on each other with no ethnic, religious, or ideological trigger, raising questions about the deep evolutionary roots of human conflict.

**3. A new daily pill could add years to your dog's lifespan: **San Francisco biotech Loyal is [closing in](https://www.newsweek.com/your-dogs-life-could-be-extended-by-new-daily-pill-what-to-know-11807106) on FDA approval for LOY-002, a beef-flavored prescription pill designed to slow biological aging in dogs. The drug targets age-related metabolic dysfunction, with the goal of extending both lifespan and healthy years in senior dogs of most sizes. The company's CEO says the drug could hit the market before the end of 2026. If approved, it would mark the first time the FDA has ever cleared a drug to slow aging in any species.

**4. Scientists create handbag made of T. rex collagen in world-first: **A teal designer handbag made using collagen derived from T. rex fossils in Amsterdam ahead of auction, where it could go for over $500K. The bag was [created](https://www.reuters.com/science/dinosaur-collagen-used-create-one-of-a-kind-handbag-2026-04-02/) by extracting ancient protein fragments from dinosaur remains, inserting them into animal cells via genetic engineering, and growing the resulting collagen into leather. It's a novelty today (perhaps even a publicity stunt), but it offers us a glimpse at how biotech could soon reinvent the materials in your daily wear.

———————————————————————————

#### **SPONSORED BY GUANTLET**

## [**No-cost session: How AI-First Engineers Pick Their Tools**](https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/3317757434715/WN_-xxc6-5rS-CYeRBF_hApfg)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/a1febeea-9459-4a70-82a9-892d91c0b53f/Night_school_Post_1920_x_1080_px_-_Josh_Martin__1_.jpg?t=1775821667)
Follow image link: (https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/3317757434715/WN_-xxc6-5rS-CYeRBF_hApfg)
Caption: 

Cursor, Claude Code, agent frameworks, model selection — the options are multiplying faster than most teams can evaluate them. The engineers shipping production AI aren't evaluating more. They're deciding faster.

This no-cost, [one-hour live session breaks down the four decisions](https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/3317757434715/WN_-xxc6-5rS-CYeRBF_hApfg) that actually matter: coding tools, model selection, harnesses, and agent frameworks.

[**Register now**](https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/3317757434715/WN_-xxc6-5rS-CYeRBF_hApfg)

———————————————————————————

#### **NEW TECH**

## **Our favorite new tech gadgets this week**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c0e980b6-143c-4eab-93be-3be25f76967d/Group_1000005181.jpg?t=1775950546)
Caption: Source: Work Louder, Cozytime, Rewindpix, Pocket

**1. **[**Work Louder Nomad[e]**](https://worklouder.cc/nomad-e/)**: **A modular keyboard for remote workers. It features an IPS display with a Pomodoro timer, a playful companion, and a “no code” configurator that allows intuitive mapping of shortcuts for improved efficiency.

**2. **[**Cozytime Lumo**](https://cozytime-tech.com/pages/lumo)**: **A compact countertop appliance that works as an oven, grill, or flat indoor BBQ. It uses far infrared heating for fast heat-up, low-smoke cooking, and dual heat zones for cooking different foods at once.

**3. **[**Rewindpix**](https://rewindpix.com/)**:** A digital film camera that lets you create your own “film rolls” with custom colors, grain, and light effects before you shoot.

**4. **[**Pocket**](https://heypocket.com/)**: **An AI-powered voice recorder that fits comfortably in your pocket. It helps you keep track of your conversations, recording and transcribing them.

———————————————————————————

#### **SOCIAL SIGNALS**

## **What’s trending in science on socials this week**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/aad3ee40-cfae-48a4-89ce-1762e4b0fc75/Group_1000005182.jpg?t=1775957031)
Follow image link: (https://www.reddit.com/r/Damnthatsinteresting/comments/1si8pmp/atmospheric_reentry_of_nasas_orion_artemis_1/?solution=10b799eb84b651b910b799eb84b651b9&js_challenge=1&token=REDACTED)
Caption: Click here to see stunning visuals from a sped-up version of Artemis 1’s atmospheric re-entry. Photo: NASA

🌕️ **Mysteries of the Moon: **Turns out everything you think you know about how the Moon looks is wrong. Under the right lens, its hidden colors pop, all captured by Artemis 2 in a [groundbreaking photo](https://x.com/moondailys/status/2041156962717405457?s=20) that’s breaking the internet. 

👀 **Vision Voodoo: **A Japanese artist Ryota Kanai has unveiled a mesmerizing optical illusion that literally ‘fixes itself’ as you stare at it, since your brain can’t help but smooth out the irregularities in its search for perfect patterns. See it [here](https://x.com/BiancoDavinci/status/2039367036032209032?s=20) and put it to the test. 

🚀 **Reentry Rush:** Artemis 2’s successful

subject: Re: Request to Release Claims
snippet: Hi Dan, Thanks for reaching out! I was able to release the two claims you listed. In regards to the list of channels you'd like me to remove all claims from, do you mind sending an Excel sheet with
body:
Hi Dan,


Thanks for reaching out! I was able to release the two claims you listed.
In regards to the list of channels you'd like me to remove all claims from,
do you mind sending an Excel sheet with the channel IDs listed or
links/video IDs to the videos that need to be released? This will make
things easier on our side. Thanks!


- Georgia

On Tue, Mar 3, 2026 at 10:53 AM Đan Hồ <dan.ho@musicmaster.io> wrote:

> Hi Support Team,
>
> It appears that this may be an API error rather than a reference overlap
> or ownership conflict.
>
> We were able to release some of the claims, but a few still show an API
> error and cannot be released from our end. Could you please review and
> release the claims for the following videos?
>
> https://youtu.be/RmxHx3l7M1U
> https://youtu.be/tfMdJKPyW1g
>
>
> Additionally, please help release all claims on the channels listed below.
> The EMVN CID system does not currently support bulk releasing claims across
> multiple channels (we don't want to whitelist those), so we would
> appreciate your assistance with this.
>
> Thank you very much for your support.
>
> Best regards,
>
> *Dan Ho*System Operator
>

subject: Invoices 2024
snippet: Hello Olga, May I ask which payments these correspond to? Sub-publishing revenue, Content ID revenue, etc... As I'm searching, but the dates and the amounts don't match any records we have.
body:
----------------------------------------------

Hello Olga,

May I ask which payments these correspond to? Sub-publishing revenue, Content ID revenue, etc...
As I'm searching, but the dates and the amounts don't match any records we have.

Please let me know if you have the detail. Otherwise, it's OK to send us the transfer notes.

Sincerely,

Thank you for sending the invoice.

However, please note that the royalty earnings amount of USD 251 is a
cumulative balance and already includes the revenue from H1 2025. As shown
in our report, the H1 2025 revenue is reflected in the line item “Remained
Revenue.”
Accordingly, we will transfer a total amount of USD 251 covering both H1
and H2 2025 earnings.

Should you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.

body:
Hi Simon,

Nice to meet you! I’ll be taking over the coordination for our monthly
newsletter highlights from here.

Following up on My’s point about local interests, *Pickleball* is also a
massive trend in Vietnam. If you have any playlists or tracks that would
suit Pickleball-related content, it would be a fantastic addition alongside
the soccer material.

To ensure we have everything ready for our March newsletter, could you
please send over the curated playlists by March 5th?

Looking forward to working with you on this!

Best regards,
*Chau Pham*
*Account Executive*


The first and largest production music library <https://emvn.co/EML> in
Vietnam with *1,5**00,000+* right-managed tracks.

subject: Re: Votre commande Combo

body:
Madame, Monsieur,

Je reviens vers vous concernant ma commande Combo.

Je tiens à vous informer que l'adresse e-mail associée devrait être celle
de mon épouse, haduongnt@gmail.com. Si ce changement n'est pas
indispensable pour la gestion du dossier, vous trouverez néanmoins en pièce
jointe la procuration signée ainsi qu'une copie de la pièce d'identité de
mon épouse.

Je reste à votre disposition pour tout complément d'information.

Cordialement,
Do Thanh

> • téléphonie mobile -> d’imprimer, de signer et de nous retourner le
> document « Procuration » ainsi que de nous transmettre la copie de votre
> carte d’identité
> soit par email ou par courrier à l’adresse ci-dessous.

> sera accepté et nous vous donnerons les informations relatives à
> l’activation des services commandés.
>
> Pour toutes questions et renseignements complémentaires, vous pouvez nous
> contacter aux coordonnées suivantes.
>
> Nous vous adressons, Madame, Monsieur, nos salutations les meilleures.

subject: Fwd: EMVN: Indiesonics Royalty Report of H2 2025
snippet: Dear Maevery I hope this e-mail finds you and your team very well. Thank you for the accounting sent through last week. We do have a problem though I'm afraid: EMVN are the only one of our sub-
body:
Dear Maevery


I hope this e-mail finds you and your team very well.

Thank you for the accounting sent through last week.

We do have a problem though I'm afraid:  EMVN are the only one of our sub-publishers we distribute to using SourceAudio - for everyone else, we use Harvest Media.  We are incurring hefty costs for SourceAudio to do this, of around $350USD each month, and after three sets of accounting from you we are nowhere near recouping these costs through revenue generated in the territory.

We do understand that we are currently 18 months in to our first 3-year agreement with you and we hope the revenues generated will increase with each accounting period; however, we're currently losing in the region of $4000USD yearly servicing EMVN, which is completely unviable for us.

Could we please look at an alternative method of delivering albums and metadata to you?   We could do this either via Harvest, or if that's not an option we'd be happy to deliver albums and metadata to you manually according to your own metadata template.

Let me know what you would suggest as a way forward.

I look forward to hearing from you.


Many thanks and kind regards




Sue Wincott

Sue Wincott
Director
E-mail: sue@indiesonics.com
Phone: +44 (0)7976 910227
Web: www.indiesonics.com

￼

> Begin forwarded message:
> 
> From: EMVN Accounting Team <accounting@emvn.co>
> Subject: EMVN: Indiesonics Royalty Report of H2 2025
> Date: 11 February 2026 at 02:25:00 GMT
> To: sue@indiesonics.com, pat@indiesonics.com, paul@indiesonics.com
> 
> Dear Susan Wincott, Pat, Paul,
> 
> 
> We are writing from EMVN Accounting Team to send the Royalty Report of H2 2025.
> 
> Your total royalty is USD 136. Please find the detailed reports in this Report Folder <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1cmVBRi3gIt0pjk2rHAZmLmD8Dwhmj8JD>.
> We will pay you the gross revenue without any withholding tax. We will notify you if our Tax Agency issues any further announcements regarding this matter.
> The minimum payment threshold is USD 100. If your earnings are below this amount, the balance will be carried forward to the next payment period and processed once the minimum threshold is met.
> 
> Should you have any question, please feel free to contact us.
> 
> 
> Kind regards,
> 
> EMVN Accounting Team
>

- Georgia

subject: Re: MM Syncing issue
snippet: Hi Sally, Thanks for flagging this, and I'm sorry for the disruption this is causing. I've checked the logs for the syncing job, and it appears the issue is due to a breaking change in the data
body:
Hi Sally,

Thanks for flagging this, and I’m sorry for the disruption this is causing.

I’ve checked the logs for the syncing job, and it appears the issue is due
to a breaking change in the data returned from the SourceAudio API, which
is preventing the sync from completing.

We’re currently investigating this as a priority. I’ll keep you updated on
progress and will let you know as soon as we have a fix or clearer timeline.

Thanks for your patience in the meantime, and again, apologies for the
inconvenience.

Best regards,
Duc

snippet: Hi Freddie, Please advise us regarding the concern in the previous email. We reviewed our previous discussion and noticed an email from January 21, 2026, stating: "The board can consist of board
body:
Hi Freddie,

Please advise us regarding the concern in the previous email.

We reviewed our previous discussion and noticed an email from January 21,
2026, stating: "*The board can consist of board members from all over the
world as long as half of them are from an EEA Country. The deputy does not
have to be from an EEA country." (*Please see the image for details)

The new information we received from your email on March 13, 2026 in this
thread states: "*There are no restrictions that the deputy has to be from
Sweden as long as he or she is within the EES*."

Please confirm the correct requirements regarding the deputy's nationality.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

*Hoai Le*
*Legal Executive*


The first and largest production music library in Vietnam with *1,0*
*00,000+* right-managed tracks.

*Tel:* +84 333 307 229
*Email:* legal@emvn.co
*Web:* https://emvn.co/
*Post:* HM Town, 412 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai, Ban Co Ward, Ho Chi Minh City,
Vietnam

subject: Re: [PrivacyCompliance] XÁC NHẬN THAM GIA BUỔI TRAO ĐỔI VỀ BẢO VỆ DỮ LIỆU CÁ NHÂN
snippet: Kính gửi Privacy Compliance, EMVN Legal xác nhận tham gia buổi trao đổi theo lịch trình trên, team EMVN xin phép xác nhận lại lịch: Thời gian: 9h - 10h, Thứ 4, ngày 15/04/2026 Hình thức: Trực tuyến qua
body:
Kính gửi Privacy Compliance,

EMVN Legal xác nhận tham gia buổi trao đổi theo lịch trình trên, team EMVN
xin phép xác nhận lại lịch:

   - *Thời gian*: 9h - 10h, Thứ 4, ngày 15/04/2026
   - *Hình thức*: Trực tuyến qua Microsoft Teams

Nhờ team Privacy Compliance gửi thông tin tham dự, đường dẫn cuộc họp cùng
tài liệu liên quan qua email ạ.

Cảm ơn sự hỗ trợ của team.

*Trân trọng,*
EMVN Legal Team


On Mon, Apr 6, 2026 at 5:30 PM Info PC <info@privacycompliance.vn> wrote:

> *Kính gửi Công ty TNHH Giải trí Đa phương tiện EpicMusicVN,*
> *PrivacyCompliance* trân trọng cảm ơn Quý Doanh nghiệp đã phản hồi và
> quan tâm đến chương trình trao đổi.
> Chúng tôi xin đề xuất lịch tổ chức buổi trao đổi như sau:
> *Thời gian:* 9h - 10h, Thứ 4, ngày 15/04/2026
> *Hình thức:* Trực tuyến qua Microsoft Teams
> Kính mong Quý Doanh nghiệp vui lòng xác nhận khả năng tham gia *trước
> ngày 11/04/2026 *để chúng tôi thuận tiện trong việc chuẩn bị và sắp xếp
> nội dung. Thông tin tham dự (bao gồm đường dẫn cuộc họp) cùng tài liệu liên
> quan sẽ được gửi tới Quý Doanh nghiệp sau khi chúng tôi nhận được xác nhận.
> Trong trường hợp cần trao đổi thêm, xin vui lòng liên hệ với chúng tôi để
> được hỗ trợ kịp thời.
> Trân trọng,
> *PrivacyCompliance*
>
> This email is confidential and may contain information that is privileged
> or exempt from disclosure under applicable laws.
> If you have received this message in error, please immediately notify the
> sender and delete this email.
>
>
> ------------------------------
> *From:* EMVN Legal <legal@emvn.co>
> *Sent:* Monday, March 30, 2026 5:07 PM
> *To:* Info PC <info@privacycompliance.vn>
> *Cc:* Long Nguyen <long@privacycompliance.vn>; EMVN Legal <legal@emvn.co>
> *Subject:* Re: [PrivacyCompliance] XÁC NHẬN THAM GIA BUỔI TRAO ĐỔI VỀ BẢO
> VỆ DỮ LIỆU CÁ NHÂN
>
> Kính gửi Privacy Compliance,
>
> EMVN Legal xin thông báo đã hoàn tất việc gửi biểu mẫu bao gồm số lượng
> thành viên tham gia cùng các câu hỏi dự kiến cho buổi trao đổi sắp tới. Đối
> với các nội dung cần làm rõ thêm, EEMVN đề xuất sẽ trao đổi trực tiếp
> trong buổi meeting để đảm bảo thảo luận hiệu quả và đầy đủ hơn.
>
> Nhờ team Privacy Compliance hỗ trợ sắp xếp lịch họp phù hợp. Thời gian
> thuận tiện nhất đối với EMVN là trong tuần tới (từ 6/4 - 10/4), mong nhận
> được đề xuất lịch cụ thể từ phía anh/chị để sắp xếp lịch cho phù hợp.
>
> Xin chân thành cảm ơn sự hỗ trợ của team.
>
> Trân trọng,
> EMVN Legal Team
>
>
> On Fri, Mar 27, 2026 at 12:37 PM EMVN Legal <legal@emvn.co> wrote:
>
> Kính gửi PrivacyCompliance,
>
> EMVN Legal xin cảm ơn Privacy Compliance đã sắp xếp và lựa chọn doanh
> nghiệp cho buổi trao đổi nội bộ về các nội dung tiếp theo sau khi tham dự
> webinar * “DPO trong Doanh nghiệp: Từ Yêu cầu pháp lý đến Triển khai thực
> tế”*.
>
> EMVN Legal xin xác nhận sẽ tham gia chương trình theo kế hoạch đã đề ra.
> Hiện tại, team đang trong quá trình tổng hợp thông tin người tham dự nội
> bộ cũng như chuẩn bị các câu hỏi liên quan để gửi qua *biểu mẫu đính kèm*.
>
> Như có trao đổi nhanh qua điện thoại với Privacy Compliance, Team Legal sẽ gửi
> thông tin chi tiết trong thời gian sớm nhất, không muộn hơn ngày
> 30/03/2026, để đảm bảo nội dung được chuẩn bị phù hợp và buổi trao đổi diễn
> ra hiệu quả nhất.
>
> Mọi thông tin phát sinh, chúng tôi sẽ chủ động liên hệ thêm. Xin trân
> trọng cảm ơn sự hỗ trợ của anh/chị.
>
> Trân trọng,
> EMVN Legal Team
>
> On Thu, Mar 26, 2026 at 11:30 AM Info PC <info@privacycompliance.vn>
> wrote:
>
> *Kính gửi Công ty TNHH Giải trí Đa phương tiện EpicMusicVN,*

> quan tâm và đăng ký tham gia chương trình trao đổi tiếp theo sau khi tham
> dự webinar “*DPO trong Doanh nghiệp: Từ Yêu cầu pháp lý đến Triển khai
> thực tế*”.
>
> Dựa trên thông tin đăng ký, chúng tôi xin xác nhận kế hoạch tổ chức buổi
> trao đổi về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân với các nội dung dự kiến như sau:
>
>    - Thời lượng: 01 giờ
>    - Hình thức: Trực tuyến qua nền tảng Microsoft Teams
>    - Ngôn ngữ trình bày: Tiếng Việt
>
> Kính đề nghị Quý Doanh nghiệp xác nhận tham gia chương trình không muộn

body:
Hi Freddie,

We have checked our previous discussion, we noticed an email from Jan 21,
2026 that "*The board can consist of board members from all over the world
as long as half of them are from an EEA Country. The deputy does not have
to be from an EEA country." (*Please see the image for details)

The new information we received from your email in March 13, 2026 in this
thread: "*There are no restrictions that the deputy has to be from Sweden
as long as he or she is within the EES*."

Please confirm the correct requirements about nationality of the deputy.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

*Bests,*
*Hoai Le*
*Legal Executive*


The first and largest production music library in Vietnam with *1,0*
*00,000+* right-managed tracks.

> Rockwater Group Inc. for this agreement: Our organization separates
> services by entity to ensure legal compliance.
>
>    - EPICMUSICVN MULTIMEDIA ENTERTAINMENT COMPANY LIMITED - *EMVN*
>    (Vietnam-based) manages our music licensing with Ms. Hoang Thi Phuong Thanh
>    serving as the legal representative, as your information. While Rockwater
>    Group Inc. ("*Rockwater*") operates independently and possesses full
>    legal authority to manage YouTube's Content ID system. Additionally,
>    Rockwater is not a holding company of EMVN. Our music services
>    include licensing (managed by EMVN), Content ID (CID), and Digital
>    Distribution (DD) services (both managed by Rockwater).
>    - Mr. Do Son Thanh holds the position of CEO at EMVN and serves as the
>    managing director of Rockwater. He possesses the legal authorization to
>    make decisions and sign all agreements and relevant documents pertaining to
>    the Content ID Service. His authority extends to acting on behalf of
>    Rockwater's legal representative in these matters. We have a formal Letter
>    of Authorization confirming his authority to act on behalf of

snippet: Kính gửi Ms. Ngọc Hiếu - Viettourist, Sau khi rà soát bộ Hợp đồng dịch vụ cho chương trình Phú Quốc tháng 03/2026, EMVN xin phép gửi lại các tài liệu đã được hiệu chỉnh đính kèm. Hiện tại phần giá
body:
Kính gửi Ms. Ngọc Hiếu - Viettourist,

Sau khi rà soát bộ Hợp đồng dịch vụ cho chương trình Phú Quốc tháng
03/2026, EMVN xin phép gửi lại các tài liệu đã được hiệu chỉnh đính kèm.
Hiện tại phần giá trong dự thảo chưa đúng với thỏa thuận mới nhất đang được
các bên thảo luận. Nhờ Quý đối tác rà soát các điều khoản sau đó cập nhật
chính xác lại Bảng giá cuối cùng trước khi ký kết.

*Về Thỏa thuận Chia sẻ Dữ liệu cá nhân (DSA): *Nhằm tuân thủ các quy định
hiện hành về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân, EMVN yêu cầu hai bên ký kết bổ sung
DSA đính kèm. Quý đối tác vui lòng rà soát và điền bổ sung thông tin nhân
sự phụ trách của phía Viettourist tại phần cuối của Thỏa thuận.

Rất mong nhận được bản cập nhật từ Quý đối tác để hai bên sớm hoàn tất thủ
tục ký kết và đặt cọc dịch vụ.

*Trân trọng,*

*An Nguyen*
*Legal Executive*


The first and largest production music library in Vietnam with *1,0*
*00,000+* right-managed tracks

*Tel*: (+84) 78 6622 148
*Email*: legal@emvn.co
*Web*: https://emvn.co
*Post*: 14th Floor, HM Town Building, 412 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai, Ban Co
Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

subject: Re: Menta Music - Low revenue - Melodic Bliss
snippet: Dear Menta Team, Please accept our sincere apologies for the missed emails. We recently underwent a change in our human resources, which unfortunately caused a delay in our communication and oversight
body:
Dear Menta Team,

Please accept our sincere apologies for the missed emails. We recently
underwent a change in our human resources, which unfortunately caused a
delay in our communication and oversight of your email.

We understand your concerns regarding the performance of Melodic Bliss and
your decision to unlink it. Moving forward, we will ensure much more
proactive communication and responsiveness from our side.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Melosy Team

Guillermo Flor posted: 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗠𝗰𝗞𝗶𝗻𝘀𝗲𝘆 𝗦𝗹𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘆𝗯𝗼𝗼𝗸 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗖𝗹𝗮𝘂𝗱𝗲 🔥 


McKinsey charges $300k for a strategy engagement. 
A big part of what you're buying is the deck: the structure, the logic, the way the argument unfolds so that a senior partner can read it in four minutes and understand exactly what you're recommending.

That framework has a name. Five rules. 

Most founders build decks that feel convincing while they're presenting and fall apart the moment someone reads them alone. 

The five rules fix that at the structural level, not the aesthetic one:
→ Pyramid Principle: the conclusion on slide one, proof after
→ SCQA: situation, complication, question, answer, in that order
→ Action titles: every heading is a thesis, readable top to bottom
→ MECE: no slide duplicates another, no logical step is missing
→ One message per slide, and one only

I built a Claude Code project that runs all five automatically. Feed it your startup brief. Get back a McKinsey-style outline. 

Inside you'll find:
 1. The Five McKinsey Rules That Make a Deck Impossible to Misread
 2. How to Set Up the Claude Project
 3. How to Make Claude Apply the Five Rules
 4. How to Input Your Startup the Right Way

Comment MCKINSEY and I'll send you the link.
Comment:https://www.linkedin.com/comm/feed/update/activity:7446533980377673728?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_notification_digest_01%3B6zQDSmLESt6jDdBHdQrXuA%3D%3D&midToken=AQHf_jqwdaNp2Q&midSig=3ILjfKVBSwwIc1&trk=eml-email_notification_digest_01-notification_digest-0-SHARED_BY_YOUR_NETWORK&trkEmail=eml-email_notification_digest_01-notification_digest-0-SHARED_BY_YOUR_NETWORK-null-3fqmvd~mnm1myow~p1-null-null-GPfI8zkoTkyE7rV2h09e3w%3D%3D&eid=3fqmvd-mnm1myow-p1&otpToken=REDACTED

Eric Vyacheslav posted: MIT proved mathematically that ChatGPT is designed to make you delusional. 

Not through lying. Through agreeing with you. 

They call it "delusional spiraling." 

You share an idea. The AI validates it. You share more. 

It validates harder. Over time, you believe things that aren't true.

The researchers tested two obvious fixes:

1. Force the chatbot to only say true things
2. Warn users the AI might be agreeing just to please them

Both failed. 

A chatbot that never lies can still mislead you by choosing which truths to highlight. 

And even fully informed, rational users still spiral.

The root cause is training. 

These models learn from human feedback. 

Users reward agreement. So the model learns to agree. 

Sycophancy isn't a bug. It's baked into how the product works.

The math shows no conversation-level fix can fully solve this. 

The problem is structural. 

Link in comments.
↓
Check out AlphaSignal.ai to get a daily summary of top models, repos, and papers in AI. Read by 280,000+ devs.

Thomas Veillet posted: 🚨 Le marché ne voit plus rien… et ça commence sérieusement à se voir

Hier, on a vécu une journée absolument fascinante.

👉 Les indices montent
👉 La volatilité s’effondre
👉 Et tout le monde trouve ça… normal

Alors que :

Le détroit d’Ormuz est toujours bloqué
Le pétrole est devenu le seul GPS du marché
Et on parie déjà sur “une guerre courte” comme si c’était un match de foot
Et puis il y a le moment magique…

👉 Le pétrole baisse de 3%

Pourquoi ?

Parce qu’on remettrait…

👉 100’000 barils par jour via un deal Irak/Kurdistan

Sauf qu’on en a 20 MILLIONS bloqués ailleurs.

Oui oui.

👉 Le marché perd 3% pour 100k barils…
👉 alors qu’il lui en manque 20 millions

À ce stade, ce n’est plus de l’analyse…
C’est du stand-up.

Et pendant ce temps-là :
Nvidia ne monte plus malgré des annonces “révolutionnaires”
META baisse
La tech fait la fête… mais en Asie

subject: Re: SKYLINE PRODUCTION MUSIC / Paris FRANCE / Intro + Distribution Inquiry
snippet: Dear Gerard and Kelli, Thank you for your time and the enlightening discussion during our meeting. It was a true pleasure. I would like to recap our meeting as follows: 1. Sub-publishing: Model of
body:
Dear Gerard and Kelli,


Thank you for your time and the enlightening discussion during our meeting.
It was a true pleasure.

I would like to recap our meeting as follows:


1. Sub-publishing:

   -

   Model of direct licensing (collect sync and performance fee): exclude
   our territories from the PRO
   -

   Support for Global Mobile Application (mobile games/podcast/audiobook
   applications launched globally): some of our clients use music into their
   mobile applications which are launched globally. Therefore, we need your
   concurrence to grant the global performance right for this usage.
   -

   Territory: Vietnam, Thailand and Indonesia
   -

   The revenue report will be generated quarterly and the payment will be
   made every 6 months.
   -

   Revenue share:

   + 50/50 for sync

   + 75/25 for performance (you/EMVN)


   -

   Music delivery: Source Audio.

I would recommend that you speak with Source Audio first to find a way to
sync your catalog to us directly. Due to current financial and personnel
constraints, we are unable to
host the fees for the catalog ourselves at this time.

That being said, if you wish to proceed with Content ID and Digital
Distribution with us besides sub-publishing, we can certainly handle all of
the logistics for those services on our end from

receiving data from Harvest to hosting on Source Audio.


2. Youtube ContentID:


Type of Revenue

Collect both Composition and Sound Recording Revenue

Revenue Enhancement:

Youtube Music

Beside normal audio, we deliver your music to Youtube music and
automatically a video with the album cover is created.

Youtube Shorts Library (Upon Request)

We can register your music to Shorts Audio Library and content creators can
use your music in their Shorts videos.

Dashboard
<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bWKQ20FvSvOKe6Y57GGR8W2GsugouM_7hc2mpbrXG_g/edit?gid=0#gid=0>

   -

   Submit and monitor the music registration progress
   -

   Manage the claims of your music on Youtube: release, reinstate, take down
   -

   Monitor your monthly revenue: an overview by dashboard/ download the
   detailed revenue report

Payment

Monthly


3. Digital Distribution

   -

   Currently we will deliver your music to over 50 digital stores, such as:
   Spotify, Apple Music/ iTunes, YouTube Music, Amazon, TikTok, FB/IG,...Check
   out the list of platforms in here
   <https://airtable.com/appj86ZCuUF8yCxMs/shrD724LFF9W68EjN>
   -

   Provide Streaming Dashboard for real-time to monitor the release’s
   performance
   -

   Reporting Period: Quarterly (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4)
   -

   Payment Timing: 30 days after the end of the following quarter.

Example: Q1 Revenue (January - March): Payment will be made within August.


Since our system is curated to include only high-quality catalog, we are
very pleased to offer you a very attractive rate: 80/20 (you/EMVN).


Our @EMVN Legal <legal@emvn.co>  team will send the templates of
Sub-Publishing, CID & DD for your review. Should you have any questions,
please don't hesitate to reach out.

Thank you again for a lovely conversation!

Best regards,

*My Nguyen (Maevery Nguyen) | Ms.*
*Business Development Lead*


The first and largest production music library <https://emvn.co/EML> in
Vietnam with *1,0**00,000+* right-managed tracks.

*Tel:* +84 38 606 2468
*Email:* license@emvn.co
*Web:* https://emvn.co/
*Meeting Link:* https://calendly.com/my-hoang-nguyen/30min
*Post:* HM Town, 412 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai, Dist. 3, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam



On Thu, Feb 26, 2026 at 10:15 AM My Nguyễn <license@emvn.co> wrote:

> Hi Gérard,
>
> Thank you for reaching out. We’ve had a look at the Skyline Production
> Music catalog, and it is truly impressive.
>
> We would love to schedule a time to meet and discuss a potential
> partnership. However, in the interest of being upfront and managing
> expectations, I want to share some internal context. Due to a high volume
> of sub-publishing inquiries, we are currently prioritizing new labels that
> are looking for a full-service partnership—specifically those who utilize
> our Content ID and Digital Distribution on DSPs services alongside
> sub-publishing. This approach helps us ensure the highest revenue
> performance for our partners.
>
> If you are still interested in exploring how we can work together under
> this full-service model, please schedule a slot on my calendar here
> <https://calendly.com/my-hoang-nguyen/30min?month=2026-02>.
>
> I look forward to connecting.
>
> Best,
> *My Nguyen (Maevery Nguyen) | Ms.*
> *Business Development Lead*
>
>
> The first and largest production music library <https://emvn.co/EML> in
> Vietnam with *1,0**00,000+* right-managed tracks.
>
> *Tel:* +84 38 606 2468
> *Email:* license@emvn.co
> *Web:* https://emvn.co/
> *Meeting Link:* https://calendly.com/my-hoang-nguyen/30min
> *Post:* HM Town, 412 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai, Dist. 3, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
>
>
>
> On Mon, Feb 23, 2026 at 3:10 AM GERARD GUEUDIN <
> gerard.gueudin@skylineproductionmusic.com> wrote:
>
>> [image: Skyline_LOGO_emails.jpg]
>>
>>
>>
>> FROM:  Gérard Gueudin
>>               David Séchan
>>               *SKYLINE Production Music*
>>               Paris, France
>>
>> TO:  Hoang Thi Phuong Thanh
>>         EMVN Production Music
>>
>>
>> Hello Hoang Thi Phuong Thanh,
>>
>> We hope this correspondence finds you and your team well. EMVN came
>> highly recommended to us via *Level 77 Music*’s executive producer Jason
>> Rudd from whom we received your contact. *Level 77* represents our
>> catalogue in the USA and Canada. We at SKYLINE PRODUCTION MUSIC would like
>> to formally introduce ourselves in hopes of potential representation and
>> distribution in your territories.
>>
>> I, Gérard Gueudin (composer/producer/publisher) and David Séchan
>> (publisher) are production music partners based in Paris, France with
>> experience in the production music industry for more than 30 years. We
>> partnered in 2022 to build SKYLINE PRODUCTION MUSIC and are growing
>> exponentially each year.
>>
>> David is honorary Vice President of the SACEM and a successful
>> publisher for decades.I am a composer/producer in the library music
>> industry for more than 25 years (BMG Production Music Catalogue / BAM Music
>> / Sakura Notes).
>>
>>
>> We are represented in France by CDM Music, EU territories by STUDIO
>> FONTANA, USA and Canada by *LEVEL 77* Music and South Korea by Modoofind.
>>
>>
>> *Skyline Production Music *collection is dedicated to showcasing high
>> level music production in all genres with a variety of talented composers
>> from all over the world. We target a fresh new look at the needs of the
>> client while maintaining artistic integrity.
>>
>> We invite you to discover *Skyline* and visit our site here:
>>
>> *https://www.skylineproductionmusic.com
>> <https://www.skylineproductionmusic.com/>*
>>
>> *Skyline Production Music’s* catalogue has grown significantly to a
>> total of 92 albums showcasing
>> a diversity of genres.
>>
>> Our rhythm of production is generally 3 albums per month partitioned into
>> 3 collections: *Skyline*,
>> *Skyline World*, *Skyline Doc*  with the latter two in the early phase
>> of development.
>>
>> If you are interested in representing us in your territories, we look
>> forward to hearing back from you and are available to discuss further at
>> your convenience.
>>
>> All the best!
>> Gérard Gueudin and David Séchan
>>
>> *gerard.gueudin@skylineproductionmusic.com
>> <gerard.gueudin@skylineproductionmusic.com>*
>>
>> *david.sechan@milosonge.com <david.sechan@milosonge.com>*

subject: Your sound stood out to us
snippet: Hi! I'm Liam Chase from RODE. I recently went through watching your channel and was seriously impressed, which is exactly why you were at the top of our list when we built out our new creator
body: Hi! I'm Liam Chase from RODE. I recently went through watching your channel and was seriously impressed, which is exactly why you were at the top of our list when we built out our new creator partnership initiative. We just launched the RodeCaster Video Core, an all-in-one production console that lets you run your entire production from one hub, and we knew right away it was made for what you do. All we're looking for is a short mention in one of your upcoming videos, your words, your style, no script. We offer a fixed rate based on your reach, the gear ships free and is yours to keep, so just hit reply and I'll send all the details across!

On 11/02/2026 03:23, EMVN Accounting Team wrote:
>
> Dear Goran Dragas,
>
> We are writing from EMVN Accounting Team to send the Royalty Report of 
> H2 2025.
>
> Your total after-tax royalty is *USD 546﻿*. Please find the detailed 
> reports in this Report Folder 
> <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OnzIygMmjvBsa6Yw7SJETAahhpX3zluA>.
>
> We'd appreciate it if you could send us your payment invoice for the 
> above-stated amount within one week once receiving this email. And in 
> the invoice, kindly make sure these points:
>
>  1. write down clearly the payment currency in “USD”
>  2. put your e-signature on the invoice (the authorized person who
>     signed on our sub-publishing agreement)
>  3. use the following information for "Bill to" part:
>
> *EpicMusicVN Co., Ltd - EMVN*
>
> *14th Floor, 412 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai*
>
> *Ward 5, District 3, Hochiminh City, Vietnam*
>
> Please be advised that there will be a bank transaction fee of USD 
> $35+ per transaction, all charges to be borne by the beneficiary.
>
> Should you have any question, please feel free to contact us.
>
> Looking forward to hearing from you soon.
>
> Kind regards,
>
> EMVN Accounting Team
>
